startPoint.en: Talk to Ariane in the lobby of the Wizards' Tower, south of Draynor Village.
startPoint.es: Habla con Ariane en el vestíbulo de Wizards' Tower, al sur de Draynor Village.

recommended.name: Wicked hood
recommended.display: Wicked hood or stardust for teleports to Wizards' Tower

rewards.name: Four new titles (speak to the Rune Guardian to retrieve the title):
rewards.display: Four new titles (speak to the Rune Guardian to retrieve the title):

rewards.name: Historian Minas
rewards.display: If you are a member, you can talk to Historian Minas in the Varrock Museum to receive 5 Kudos

rewards.name: The Harmony of the Runes (music track)
rewards.display: The Harmony of the Runes (Outside the Wizards' Tower)

rewards.name: Forgotten Orders
rewards.display: Forgotten Orders (Entering the Ruins after completing the quest)

rewards.name: Bloody Foundation
rewards.display: Bloody Foundation (During the final section of the quest)

text.en: Talk to Ariane in the entrance to Wizards' Tower.
text.es: Habla con Ariane en la entrada de Wizards' Tower.

chatOptions: 1 What's happening here?
2 What can I do to help?
Accept

text.en: Head into the tower, pick up the Tower mindspike and attack the vortex with any spell. You must unequip any ranged, melee, or necromancy armour or you may not be able to lure the vortex.
text.es: Entra en la torre, coge el Tower mindspike y ataca el vórtice con cualquier hechizo. Debes desequipar cualquier armadura de distancia, cuerpo a cuerpo o nigromancia, o puede que no consigas atraer al vórtice.

text.en: Lure the vortex into the energy beam.
text.es: Atrae al vórtice hacia el haz de energía.

text.en: Talk to Ariane on the bridge outside.
text.es: Habla con Ariane en el puente exterior.

chatOptions: 3 What do you want me to do?
2 I'll get on it.

text.en: Ascend the beam twice, and talk to Wizard Traiborn in the northwestern room.
text.es: Sube por el haz dos veces y habla con Wizard Traiborn en la sala noroeste.

chatOptions: 1 Have you seen anything unusual lately?
2 In the power beam?
2 Where do these things come from?

text.en: Talk to Archmage Sedridor in the southern room.
text.es: Habla con Archmage Sedridor en la sala sur.

chatOptions: 3 Ariane says the tower is in danger.
3 What are you going to do?
4 Goodbye.

text.en: If Love Story has been completed.
text.es: Si se ha completado Love Story.

chatOptions: 4 Ariane says the tower is in danger.
3 What are you going to do?
4 Goodbye.

text.en: Talk to Wizard Ellaron in the northeastern room.
text.es: Habla con Wizard Ellaron en la sala noreste.

chatOptions: 2 Ariane says the tower is in danger.
2 Thanks.

text.en: Descend the beam twice or right-click and select bottom floor back to the 1st floor.
text.es: Baja por el haz de luz dos veces, o haz clic derecho y selecciona la planta baja para volver a la 1ª planta.

text.en: Talk to Ariane.
text.es: Habla con Ariane.

chatOptions: 2 I've spoken to some of the wizards...
3 Wizard Traiborn said something came through the library floor.
2 Then let's get down there and investigate!
2 I'll get right on it.

text.en: Ascend the beam twice.
text.es: Sube por el haz dos veces.

text.en: Talk to Wizard Ellaron.
text.es: Habla con Wizard Ellaron.

chatOptions: 2 How can I get into the old tower?
3 You do know, though?
3 You mean the rumour about Water Surge?
3 What do you mean, the key lies in understanding Water Surge?
2 It's such a pity you couldn't help me, Maybe I'll visit the library.

text.en: Go back to the 1st floor and search the easternmost bookcase for The Harmony of the Runes and The Runes of the Spells of Water.
text.es: Vuelve a la 1ª planta y registra la estantería más al este para encontrar The Harmony of the Runes y The Runes of the Spells of Water.

highlightTerms: The Runes of the Spells of Water

text.en: Read the books.
text.es: Lee los libros.

text.en: Play the organ at the southern end of the 1st floor.
text.es: Toca el órgano en el extremo sur de la 1ª planta.

text.en: Press the organ keys in the following order: 10x "B", 7x "A#", 1x "G#", and 1x "G". (small black keys are # notes)
text.es: Pulsa las teclas del órgano en el siguiente orden: 10x "B", 7x "A#", 1x "G#" y 1x "G". (las teclas negras pequeñas son notas #)

text.en: Take the organ key.
text.es: Coge la llave del órgano.

text.en: Head to the north side of the island and talk to Ariane, then head east and enter the door on the seashore.
text.es: Dirígete al lado norte de la isla y habla con Ariane, luego ve hacia el este y entra por la puerta en la orilla del mar.

chatOptions: 2 I've got the key to the ruins.
Any

text.en: Talk to Ariane
text.es: Habla con Ariane

chatOptions: 2 We should keep our minds on the job.
1 Yes, it's inspiring.
2 Okay, what should we do now?

text.en: Talk to the rune guardian and answer the questions any way.
text.es: Habla con el rune guardian y responde las preguntas de cualquier forma.

chatOptions: 3 I'm ready to be tested.
Any
Any
Any
Any
Any

text.en: The options you pick only dictate the title you're given. See the full guide to learn more.
text.es: Las opciones que elijas solo determinan el título que se te otorga. Consulta la guía completa para saber más.

text.en: Enter the door behind the rune guardian.
text.es: Entra por la puerta detrás del rune guardian.

text.en: Walk down the stairs to the gap in front of Ariane.
text.es: Baja las escaleras hasta el hueco frente a Ariane.

text.en: Climb behind the statue (on the wall above the gap).
text.es: Trepa detrás de la estatua (en la pared sobre el hueco).

chatOptions: 1 I'm making us a bridge.
1 Do you have a better idea?

text.en: Cross the statue (gap) and climb down the staircase.
text.es: Cruza la estatua (el hueco) y baja por la escalera.

text.en: Talk to Ariane.
text.es: Habla con Ariane.

chatOptions: 1 I wish I could have seen it.

text.en: Use magic to lure a vortex into Ariane's circle, and keep it there until the circle disappears. You can lure them by attacking them.
text.es: Usa magia para atraer un vórtice hacia el círculo de Ariane, y mantenlo ahí hasta que el círculo desaparezca. Puedes atraerlos atacándolos.

text.en: Talk to Ariane again.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con Ariane.

chatOptions: 2 Never mind the history, what does that mean for us?
2 Okay, so what do we do?
3 Okay, I'll do that now.

text.en: Exit the ruins.
text.es: Sal de las ruinas.

text.en: Head back to the organ on the main floor of the tower and play any of the notes from the lowest set of keys to trigger several cutscenes.
text.es: Vuelve al órgano en la planta principal de la torre y toca cualquiera de las notas del conjunto de teclas más bajo para activar varias escenas.

text.en: Talk to Ariane (east side of the island at the entrance to the lower tower).
text.es: Habla con Ariane (lado este de la isla, en la entrada de la torre inferior).

chatOptions: 3 Is there a reward?

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
